pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py as the required department name to be configured.
Found in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py as the target user to be registered and assigned as a LiveChat agent.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the Rocket.Chat environment uses real release announcement data from the official Rocket.Chat GitHub repository, not synthetic data. The target agent to be assigned ('agent.user'), target department ('Technical Support'), admin user ('admin'), and admin password ('Admin1234!') were explicitly confirmed against the configuration scripts (setup_rocket_chat.sh, task_utils.sh), setup logic (setup_task.sh), and the validation scripts (export_result.sh, verifier.py). All metadata claims strictly match the parameters enforced and tested by the task environment.
